predictions.source_quote: 2024 looks like a year of slowing GDP growth, single-digit earnings growth and single-digit returns on the median S&P 500 stock.
We expect single digit earnings growth and single digit returns on the median US stock in 2024, with continued outperformance by the megacaps.

predictions.forecast_value: Fluctuate between 4% and 5%; if breakout, likely to 5.5%
predictions.source_quote: I believe they will fluctuate between 4% and 5% in 2024, but if they break out I suspect it would be to 5.5%.
We also expect wage inflation to decline based on the decline in advertised wages.

predictions.forecast_value: Less than 1.4% (140bps) of easing; hopes for less easing
predictions.source_quote: Futures markets are pricing in 1.4% of Fed easing by the end of 2024; I hope it's less than that since too much easing too fast could reignite inflation.
Leading indicators point to slowing economic growth but not a collapse.
